ddls:
CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the library */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the library */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the library is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the library is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the library */,
  "library_type" TEXT /* Type of library (e.g., public, private, academic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "pay_grade" INTEGER /* Pay grade of the position */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the position */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the position */,
  "reporting_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting manager for the position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the position (e.g., administration, technical services, circulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library where the employee works */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position held by the employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "benefits" REAL /* Benefits of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive, on-leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefit_plans" (
  "benefit_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit plan (e.g., health, retirement, paid time off) */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium cost of the benefit plan */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the benefit plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit plan */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit was enrolled */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the employee (e.g., enrolled, pending, declined) */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_plan_id") REFERENCES benefit_plans ("benefit_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary change took effect */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change (e.g., promotion, cost-of-living adjustment, performance-based raise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
